name: From Errors to Rules: Iterative Prompt Optimization for Text Classification

description: arXiv:2607.20497v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Prompt optimization for text classification spans diverse approaches, from demonstration selection to exploration-based search to error-driven diagnosis, each with known but incompletely characterized strengths and limitations. We conduct a comprehensive empirical study across diverse classification benchmarks (2 to 150 classes) comparing these pa...
author: Yueying Cui, Renhao Xue, Yi Zhang, Mukul Prasad
